name: fccsecurity-doc-activation
description: Local activation plugin for the complete FCCSecurity docs-only defensive workflow and its audit artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Activate FCCSecurity docs-only defensive workflow from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides local Codex skills that operationalize the FCCSecurity docs-only workflow, including the safety test plan, security findings, remediation backlog, and patch validation report from bundled references.
interface.defaultPrompt: Continue FCCSecurity docs-only using the installed activation plugin.
